case_title: HUNG TAN VS. PAUL HYONG PYO HONG et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST GREGORY J. BULLIUNG, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-18-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-05-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DAVE DAVENPORT. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
